Now, Jessica saw her driving to the water park from 5am to 1pm. Wait, that's a long time. So from 5 am to 1 pm, Betty was at the water park. So during that time, she couldn't have gone to the bakery, right? So any time from 5am to 1pm is out. Then, Susan saw Betty stretching at a yoga studio from 1pm to 4pm.
